questions.enonce: How is the Present Perfect formed?
We use Present Perfect for an action that happened at a specific past time (like 'yesterday').
I {{1}} (never/see) a polar bear in real life.

pairs.right: Used in questions about life experience
To say an action hasn't happened before
To say an action happened very recently

questions.enonce: Complete: 'She ____ (work) as an environmentalist for 10 years.'
